steps.title: Explain the challenge
steps.content: The phrase after the blank, finding that elusive thread, explains what kind of challenge would set a curator's mind into motion. It is not an independent clause.

steps.title: Introduce the elaboration
steps.content: Choice A places a colon after finding, where nothing follows to complete it. Choice B creates a fragment, and Choice C uses a semicolon before a phrase that is not independent. A colon after motion introduces the explanation. The answer is D.
